---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "Feature & Enhancement 💫"
labels: enhancement
---

## 🎯 What Problem Does This Solve?

Tell us what's frustrating or missing — in simple words.  
Ex: *"I'm always frustrated when [...]"*

## 💡 Your Ideal Solution

Describe what you'd love to happen. No idea is too small or too wild!

## 🔄 Alternatives You've Considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Let us know — it might spark an even better idea.

## 📸 Screenshots or Examples (if helpful)

Drag and drop any mockups, sketches, or examples here. A picture is worth a thousand lines of code!

## 📝 Additional Context

Anything else you want to add? Links, past experiences, use cases — we're all ears.

---

### 🌟 A Little Encouragement

Every great feature started as a suggestion just like this one.  
Thank you for helping make **Koda** better for everyone who learns Python.

### ✅ Code of Conduct

- [ ] I have read and agree to follow the project's Code of Conduct

---

**You're awesome for sharing your idea! 🐍✨**
